description: Reference documentation for FLAC syntax elements and model properties. These are not standalone commands but language elements used within commands.

constitutive-models.name: Constitutive Models
constitutive-models.description: FLAC zone constitutive (material) model properties — mohr-coulomb, drucker-prager, modified-cam-clay, cysoil, plastic-hardening, etc. Property vocabulary for 'zone property'.
constitutive-models.summary: 38 FLAC zone material models (version-agnostic): elastic/plastic/cap/creep families — the property keywords for 'zone cmodel assign' + 'zone property'
constitutive-models.usage: zone cmodel assign <name> ; zone property <prop> <value> [range cmodel-name <name>]

range-elements.name: Range Elements
range-elements.description: Range filtering syntax (position, cylinder, group, id, etc.)
range-elements.summary: Geometric, attribute, and logical range filters

plot-items.name: Plot Item Keywords
plot-items.description: Configuration keywords for common FLAC plot item types (zone, gridpoint, and structural elements).
plot-items.summary: Keywords for 'plot item create <type>' — color-by, cut, transparency, legends, labels, and rendering controls

boundary-conditions.name: Boundary Conditions
boundary-conditions.description: Practical keyword maps for mechanical, fluid, thermal, and dynamic FLAC boundary conditions.
boundary-conditions.summary: Keyword families for 'zone face apply', 'zone gridpoint fix/free', and boundary-condition modifiers
boundary-conditions.usage: zone face apply <condition> <value> [modifier] [range]; zone gridpoint fix <condition> [range]

initial-conditions.name: Initial Conditions
initial-conditions.description: Reference patterns for stress, pore-pressure, density, temperature, displacement, and staged initial-state setup.
initial-conditions.summary: Common setup recipes using 'zone initialize', 'zone initialize-stresses', 'model gravity', and solve/reset workflows

structural-properties.name: Structural Element Properties
structural-properties.description: Property keyword groups for FLAC structural elements such as cable, beam, pile, shell, liner, and geogrid.
structural-properties.summary: Property vocabularies for 'structure <type> property' and related structural-element workflows

histories-and-results.name: Histories and Results
histories-and-results.description: Monitoring, field-query, and results-export keyword references for FLAC model validation.
histories-and-results.summary: Keyword families for 'history', 'zone history', 'zone.field.*', 'zone results', and 'model results export'
histories-and-results.usage: history interval <i>; zone history <name> position <v>; zone results <keyword> <bool>; model results export <file>

fish-intrinsics.name: FISH Intrinsics
fish-intrinsics.description: Common FISH intrinsic families for scripted FLAC model inspection, field queries, and object iteration.
fish-intrinsics.summary: Practical maps for zone/gridpoint/structure/field/math FISH intrinsics used in validation scripts
fish-intrinsics.usage: fish define <name>; loop foreach local z zone.list; zone.field.name = '<field>'; zone.field.get(<pos>)

interface-and-joints.name: Interfaces and Joints
interface-and-joints.description: Reference keyword groups for zone interface and joint workflows.
interface-and-joints.summary: Creation, property, attach/contact, history, and validation patterns for discontinuities and interface elements
interface-and-joints.usage: zone interface create ...; zone interface node property <keyword> <value>; fracture joint-set ...

geometry-data-table.name: Geometry, Data, and Table
geometry-data-table.description: Reference workflows for imported geometry, labeled/scalar/vector/tensor data sets, and table curves.
geometry-data-table.summary: Geometry import/group/range workflows, data-set storage, and table-driven boundary/property patterns
geometry-data-table.usage: geometry import <file>; data scalar import <file>; table import <file>; range geometry ...

sketch-and-building-blocks.name: Sketch and Building Blocks
sketch-and-building-blocks.description: Model-generation workflow references for FLAC sketch commands and FLAC3D building-block commands.
sketch-and-building-blocks.summary: Sketch object workflow for FLAC2D/FLAC3D and 3D-only building-block mesh workflows
sketch-and-building-blocks.usage: sketch point/edge/block/mesh ...; zone generate from-sketch; building-blocks block ...

notes: References are syntax elements used within commands, not standalone commands
